title: cochlearia officinalis subsp. norvegica
intro: Cochlearia officinalis subsp. norvegica, also known as Norwegian rockcress, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Cochlearia officinalis. This plant is known for its edible leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Norwegian rockcress include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves.
